scope: P22 pre-implementation plan review for test/workbench-projection.test.js below-500 split

non_blocking_notes.summary: `test/helpers/workbench-projection.js` contextPack() currently hardcodes `acceptance_gates: ["node --test test/workbench-projection.test.js"]`; P22 should update this fixture to reference the root and new projection shards so downstream generated acceptance gates do not point only at the old root.
The reviewer-aggregate shard budget is feasible but has limited headroom, so imports and wrapper boilerplate should stay minimal.
The P22 parity artifact should explicitly supersede the existing P12 workbench projection split parity artifact to avoid stale-artifact confusion.
